message.content:
@startuml
title Kubectl Request

actor "kubectl" as k8scli1 at 0%
participant "K8s Auth Proxy\n(nginx)" as authproxy at 35%
database "Hydra\n(OAuth2/OIDC Provider)\n(port :4446/7)" as hydra at 90%


k8scli1 ->>authproxy: GET https://<cluster-url>/api/pods \nHeader { Authentication Bearer <token>} 
activate authproxy 

alt If good token
    
    group Hydra Token Validation
        
        note right of authproxy #lightgreen
            The proxy validates tokens by calling /userinfo on Hydra.\nThe response contains claims about user identity/groups.
            
            Example Response:\n{\n   \"sub\": \"admin\",\n   \"email_verified\": true,\n   ... etc ...\n}    
        
        endnote 
        
       activate hydra  
       
      authproxy->hydra:GET http://hydra.system-auth.svc.cluster.local/userinfo
      
     deactivate hydra
     
     
end alt 


deactivate authproxy



@enduml
